Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are building the ultimate kayak vehicle, a Nissan Frontier Pro 4X, in one month.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Video.summary: Under a tight deadline for SEMA, Chris and Eric are scrambling to finish their Nissan Frontier.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew rescues a familiar green 1971 Chevy Caprice.
Video.title: Driveway Rescue - 1971 Chevy Caprice

Video.summary: We kick off a new project, a 1971 Chevy Caprice, by searching through a big-body boneyard.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 1

Video.summary: We mock, swap, and drop in a new transmission to handle all the power we’re adding to our Caprice.
Video.title: Fat Stack Caprice – Part 2

Video.summary: Our GM long block gets a big blower and a versatile EFI setup.
Video.title: Supercharged Stroker LS3

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We're tearing apart a 1956 Chevrolet 210 to prep it for paint, finding rusty bolts & treasures along the way.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock – Body Moving

Video.summary: We bust rust in their Chevy 210, welding new floor pans and stripping it for paint!
Video.title: Project Shell Shock – Metal Makeover

Video.summary: We're adding new brakes, taillights, power windows, and fresh interior paint to our '56 Chevy 210 Gasser.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Image.alt: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: From freeway to farmyard, this rugged straight six was everywhere! It’s the subject of our latest build.
Video.title: Ford 300 Inline Six

Video.summary: Even after 45 years, our antique Ford engine still runs.
Video.title: A Fine Inline Six

Video.summary: The six-cylinder Ford’s numbers keep climbing as we give it major cam, piston, and cylinder head upgrades.
Video.title: Ford’s Big Buzzin’ Half Dozen

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special
